name: DealerTrack Automotive Dealer F&I API
what_it_does: DealerTrack REST API for automotive dealership F&I (Finance & Insurance) and compliance platform (Cox Automotive). Enables AI agents to manage vehicle financing application and credit decisioning, handle F&I product and menu presentation data, access compliance and regulatory workflow management, retrieve deal and contract management data, manage lender routing and indirect lending workflows, handle trade-in and vehicle valuation integration, access aftermarket product and warranty data, retrieve dealer performance analytics, manage digital contracting and e-signature, and integrate F&I with DMS and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing financing applications and credit routing from automotive F&I automation agents
Accessing deal structure and F&I menu data from dealership sales automation agents
Retrieving compliance and regulatory checks from automotive compliance agents
Integrating F&I workflows with DMS from dealership operations agents
not_for: Non-automotive lending without dealership F&I and indirect lending focus
Vehicle rental without dealership sales and financing workflows
Consumer auto loans without dealer indirect lending model
best_when: An automotive dealership, dealer group, or F&I product provider using DealerTrack wants AI agents to automate credit application routing, F&I menu presentation, deal management, compliance checking, and lender integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Auto loan application data includes sensitive consumer financial information, FICO scores, and personal data. ECOA compliance — automated credit decisions must comply with fair lending laws. Reg B adverse action notices are required for declined applications. Dealer markup and dealer reserve data is sensitive business information.

auth.notes: DealerTrack uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dealer and lender-level credentials with F&I, compliance, and DMS scopes. Developer portal via Cox Automotive. Webhooks for financing events. Cox Automotive ecosystem with Dealertrack, Autotrader, Kelley Blue Book. Part of Cox Enterprises.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — automotive dealer enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-rooftop and transaction dealer pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Lake Mary, Florida. Cox Automotive subsidiary. Founded 1998. Market leader for automotive F&I platform. Used by 26,000+ dealerships. 40,000+ lender connections. Cox Automotive revenue $9B+. Acquired by Cox Enterprises 2014. DealerTrack DMS competes with CDK Global and Reynolds & Reynolds. F&I platform for franchise and independent dealers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ECOA/Reg B compliance — automated credit decisioning must include adverse action notices
FCRA compliance — credit report data has strict usage limitations and consumer rights
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API via Cox Automotive developer portal
Dealer markup/reserve automation — F&I compensation structures are sensitive and regulated
Gramm-Leach-Bliley — consumer financial data requires privacy notices and opt-out rights
Digital contracting must comply with E-SIGN Act for valid electronic signatures
agent_readiness.security_notes: Auto financing and consumer financial data. SOC2, FCRA, ECOA, GLB. OAuth2. US data residency. Fair lending compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Auto financing data. SOC2, FCRA, ECOA, GLB. OAuth2. US data residency. Fair lending and consumer rights.
